name: Honey Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together butter and honey until smooth.
3. Beat in eggs until well combined.
4. Stir in flour mixture until just blended.
5. Pour into greased 9x5 inch loaf pan.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Allow to cool before serving.
